name: wxcode/admin-verdant-clinic
title: Verdant Clinic Admin
description: Calm, clinical light-mode admin dashboard for clinic and healthcare operations — left sidebar with department switcher, topbar with search and clinician avatar, 4 KPI cards (patients today, appointments, avg wait, bed occupancy), today's appointment schedule, vitals occupancy mini-chart, and a recent patients table. Emerald-to-teal accent palette with triage status colors.

query.en: Build me a clinic operations admin dashboard — left sidebar with department switcher, topbar with search and clinician avatar, 4 KPI cards (patients today, appointments, avg wait, bed occupancy), a today's appointments schedule list, a mini occupancy chart, and a recent patients table.
query.zh-CN: 使用这个插件完成以下任务：Build me a clinic operations admin dashboard — left sidebar with department switcher, topbar with search and clinician avatar, 4 KPI cards, appointments schedule, occupancy chart, recent patients table.

provenance.note: category design-language reference only; original implementation
